name: stegosuite
title: stegosuite
summary: steganography tool to hide information in image files
description:
steganography tool to hide information in image files
Stegosuite is a graphical steganography tool to easily hide information in
image files. It allows the embedding of text messages and multiple files of any
type. In addition, the embedded data is encrypted using AES.
Currently supported file types are BMP, GIF, JPG and PNG.
Stegosuite is written in Java and utilizes the SWT toolkit for its interface.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use stegosuite because steganography tool to hide information in image files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use stegosuite as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `stegosuite [-hV] [COMMAND]` as documented upstream for stegosuite.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `stegosuite help embed` as documented upstream for stegosuite.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `stegosuite 0.9                               2022-10-19                               STEGOSUITE(1)` as documented upstream for stegosuite.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair stegosuite with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `stegosuite --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
